result.stdout:
Description:
  Encrypt or decrypt a file using AES 128, 192, or 256 bit encryption.

Usage:
  enigma <encrypt | decrypt> --file=<FilePath> --key=<AES Key>

Arguments:
  --file -f      Required; Value argument; Specifies the file or directory path. 
  --key -k       Optional; Value argument; Specifies the key. 
  --recurse -r   Optional; Flag argument;  Specifies if the application will recurse starting at the specified directory path.
Extra:
  --version -v | --help -h
